subject: FW: Dec. 24
body:
Jeff,  read the email below between Joyce and I.    Joyce gets the kids
every year for the entire Christmas vacation.  (I get them for the
mid-winter break in March).   I wanted to take them to the New York String
Orchestra Seminar concert on the 24th  They are playing with Emanuel Ax.

 

 

Joyce,

 

I am going to be in NY for the 24th, and going to the concert at Carnegie
Hall.  I'd like to take the kids if you don't have other plans for them.
Let me know so I can make plans for the tickets.

 

Thanks

 

 

From: Joyce Anderson [mailto:joyceanderson@mindspring.com] 
Sent: Thursday, December 10, 2015 9:25 AM
To: izmo@mindspring.com
Subject: Re: Dec. 24

 

Good morning 

 

We are going to my sister Barbara's house on Christmas eve.   I did ask them
if they would like to join you instead and Jason's reply was  "fuck no" and
Serena's response was gentler but along the same lines.  It was very funny. 

Joyce 

On Dec 9, 2015, at 5:00 PM, Mark L. Epstein wrote:
